fortune_deck.name: The Star (XVII)
fortune_deck.roleplay_function: The path of Optimism and Recovery
fortune_deck.guidelines: The choice must involve lowering defenses, offering mercy, or trusting in a positive outcome despite the odds.

fortune_deck.name: The Tower (XVI)
fortune_deck.guidelines: The choice must involve shattering the status quo, causing a scene, or breaking structures/laws violently.

fortune_deck.name: The Devil (XV)
fortune_deck.roleplay_function: The path of Indulgence and Obsession
fortune_deck.guidelines: The choice must involve giving in to base desires (lust, greed, power), accepting a dark bargain, or enslaving others.

fortune_deck.name: The Hanged Man (XII)
fortune_deck.guidelines: The choice must involve waiting, doing nothing, surrendering control to gain insight, or self-sacrifice.

fortune_deck.name: Death (XIII)
fortune_deck.guidelines: The choice must involve closing a chapter forever, cutting ties, or a final goodbye.

fortune_deck.name: The Sun (XIX)
fortune_deck.guidelines: The choice must involve stepping into the light, refusing to hide, or physical assertion.

fortune_deck.name: The World (XXI)
fortune_deck.guidelines: The choice must involve achieving a goal, uniting disparate parts, or executing a plan perfectly.

fortune_deck.name: Judgement (XX)
fortune_deck.guidelines: The choice must involve making a definitive judgment on the past, answering a calling, or declaring guilt/innocence.

fortune_deck.name: The Moon (XVIII)
fortune_deck.roleplay_function: The path of Subterfuge and Guile
fortune_deck.guidelines: The choice must involve navigating shadows, deception, or trusting gut instincts over logic.

fortune_deck.name: Temperance (XIV)
fortune_deck.roleplay_function: The path of Balance and Transmutation
fortune_deck.guidelines: The choice must involve blending opposites, finding a middle ground, or waiting for the right moment.

content.The Stream: Focus on the uninterrupted flow of consciousness. Avoid pauses. Let the narrative spill over.
content.The Prop: Center the action around a physical object in the scene. Give it weight, texture, and history.
content.The Satirist: Adopt a tone of detached amusement. Highlight the absurdity of the situation.
content.The Anchor: Ground the scene in visceral, unchanging reality. Focus on the mundane details that persist.
content.The Shadow: Focus on the unsaid, the hidden motives, and the darkened corners of the mind.
